_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
commits: feat(cycle-25): low-poly menu scene rebuild -- cliff tower ocean flatshading
notes: Cycle 25 LOW-POLY MENU REBUILD. Full rewrite of MainMenuScene.ts to match reference coastal cliff image. Key fix: flatShading:true on ALL MeshStandardMaterial + antialias:false + NoToneMapping. Tower upgraded from BoxGeometry to CylinderGeometry(7-seg) with sandy grey #8a8068 and conical roof. Ocean replaced ShaderMaterial with PlaneGeometry(30x20) + per-frame vertex displacement for animated polygon waves. Sky replaced ShaderMaterial sphere with BoxGeometry BackSide. 8 flat cloud planes in dark grey polygon style. 18 ConeGeometry(4-seg) diamond bushes as vegetation. displaceVertices() on all cliff rocks for angular facets. Camera repositioned to (-8,18,28) high angle. Bundle: 123.07→116.20KB app (-5.6%). TS: 0 errors. Build: 2.42s. All gates PASS. Visual scores: cliff 7/10, tower 8/10, ocean 7/10, sky 6/10, veg 8/10, flatShading 9/10, overall 7/10.
